title: My Immediate World
description: Module Two — Immediate environment: describing friends with adjectives of quality, describing places with where-questions and prepositions, possessive adjectives, yes/no questions, the present progressive for actions happening now, polite requests with can at the airport, greetings and taking leave, and invitations with would you like / what about at lunch time
sources: Let's Learn English — 7th year Basic Education, Teacher's Book (CNP 541702) — Module Two
English Programme for Basic Education, Ministry of Education, Tunisia (March 2005)
